action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 5 eval returned exprate=0.0 (only 2 samples within edit distance 2). Model barely better than random. Analysis: The ResNet-50 encoder with stride=32 loses fine details (handwritten characters ~40px height become 1-2 feature pixels). No 2D positional encoding on flattened image features breaks spatial structure. Also missing memory padding mask may cause attention to padding. Decision: Upgrade encoder to ResNet-50 up to layer3 (stride=16) for higher resolution, add 2D sinusoidal positional encoding, add memory_key_padding_mask, increase epochs to 20 with better augmentation and learning rate schedule, implement beam search. Submit eval after training to measure improvement.
